titleStmt.title: SII 30.234: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 234. (A.R. No. 585 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Madhyasthanātha temple-on the west wall of the mukha-maṇḍapa Aḻaganperumāḷ Parākrama-Pāṇḍya: Year 2+6, Saka 1403: Rishabha 30, Sunday, śu. di. 9, Uttara: 1482 A.D. Sunday, May 24

summary.p: Incomplete. Seems to record gift of land by Śrivallaba dēvaṉ, the prince and son of the king Parākrama pāṇḍyan for reciting Vēdās, for conducting special offerings and worship on the occasion of ashṭami and pradōsha and for various purposes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ādicaṇḍeśvarāñjeyam śakāptam Āyirattu nāṉāṟṟuRead- nāṉūṟṟumuṉṟiṉ mel ce
llā niṉṟa naṅkumāraṉ Aḻakaṉperumāḷ parākkirama pāṇṭiya tevaṉukku yāṇṭu Ira
ṇṭāvatiṉ Etir Āṟāvatu Iṣapa nāyaṟṟu muppatān tiyatiyum pūrvabakṣattu navamiyum Āditya
vāramum siddhayokamum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ muṉṉāḷ naṅkumāraṉ śrīvallabha
devaṉ nammuṉpu Addhyadhanam ceyyum paṭi kaṟpittu vaitta śrīvallabhacca
turvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷuṭaṉ kūṭi namakku Eṇṇai vaikkumpaṭi kaṟpitta
Ātreyagotrattu bhodhāyana sūtrattu cavaṇyaril cokkanātar nārumpūṅko
ṇṭāṉukku naṅkumāraṉ śrīvallabhadevan namakku Aṭṭamikkum piradoṣattukku taṉpi
ṟanta nāḷil naṭakka kaṟpitta tāraikkum Ivaṉ namakku Eṇṇai vaikkumpaṭi kaṟpi
ttu Ivaṉukku Iṟaiyili viṭavum Ārināṭṭu māṉāparaṇappereri paṟṟil namakku viṭṭa nila
m nālu māvil Ivaṉukku Udagavūrva dhammadānamāka kuṭutta bhāgam Oṉṟukku maṉai Oṉṟukku
m toṭṭamum toṭṭakkūṟṟukkum Iṟaiyili nilam Orumāvukkum viṭṭanam Ālaiyatti
l muṉṟām pirakārattil śrīvallabhanperunteruvil kiḻaicciṟakil kecavabhaṭṭan maṉai
kku teṟku maṉai Oṉṟum toṭṭamum toṭṭakkūṟum māṉāparaṇappereri paṟṟil Iṟaiyi
liāka viṭṭa nilam Oru māvukku nam Ālaiyakkaṇakku Aḻakiya cokkaṉā
ṉ kaṇakkilum Aṉu Iṭṭa kaittaṭippaṭi melaikkaṭṭaḷai mutalkaṇṇāṟu taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam
taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇiyiṉ mukkāle Araikkālum Itaṉ teṉkiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟi
ṉ kāliṭai vaṭakiḻakku taṭi muṉṟu nilam kāṇik kiḻaraiyum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟu taṭi O
mukkālukku kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam kāṇiyiṉ kālum Itaṉ kiḻakku taṭi muṉṟu nilam kā
Iraṇṭu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ mukkālum Āka nilam Oru mā Innilam Oru mā
toṭṭakkūṟum kaiyyāṇṭu Āṟāvatu pacāṉa varaiyum kuṭipaṟṟu maṟuvāti niruṭaiṉāya
naṅkumāraṉ tiruvātirai nāṭpiṟanta parākkiramapāṇṭiyatevaṉ Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etir Eḻāvatu muta
Uḻumpoḻutu Appaṟṟukku kuṭipaṟṟukku Uḻukiṟa maruyātiyil kuṭi Irapa Āka Uḻutukoṇṭu
ttiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ kaṇakkilum kāriyakaṇakku tirukkuṟṟāla muṭaiyāṉ kaṇakkilum
Iṉ kaṇakku naraciṅkatevaṉ kaṇakkilum Aṉuiṭṭu Immariyātiyile Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku
Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka Innilam Oru māvum patiṉmuḻattil maṉaiyum toṭṭamum
Digital edition of SII 30.234 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
